name: Locked assembly prevents BOM item creation
steps:
Given a part 'Locked Assembly' is marked as both Assembly and Locked
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the 'BOM' tab of 'Locked Assembly'
When the user attempts to add a new BOM line item by clicking 'Add BOM Item'
Then the system prevents the action and displays an error indicating BOM items cannot be created for a locked assembly

name: Locked part cannot be deleted
steps:
Given a part 'Production Part X' is marked as Locked
Given a user with part delete permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Production Part X'
When the user attempts to delete 'Production Part X' via the part actions menu
Then the system prevents deletion and displays an error message indicating the part is locked and cannot be deleted

name: Locked part prevents parameter creation
steps:
Given a part 'Locked Sensor' is marked as Locked
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the 'Parameters' tab of 'Locked Sensor'
When the user attempts to add a new parameter by clicking 'Add Parameter'
Then the system prevents the action and displays an error indicating parameters cannot be created for a locked part
